name_en: Bottega Veneta's 2024 Fall/Winter highlight, shining from the runway to the streets. It brings a rich retro vibe and easily creates different styles through versatile combinations. Whether for a professional office look or casual daily wear, the full-grain calfskin is a fashion element you cannot miss!
